calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jul-16-2019 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jun-18-2019 Continued To Jul-16-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lon Lazar for John Hennessey (Petitioner).

The Court noted that there is an issue as to whether the submission concerning venue is sufficient and that there is an issue concerning notice as it does not contain the required language pursuant to Probate Code 851(c). Mr. Lazar stated that he used the Court form (notice of hearing), that there is no reason for any of the notified parties to object and that all of the parties did receive notice. Mr. Lazar also stated that the Petitioner has dealt with all of the assets that were in the trust, that the only thing left to do is to give the Petitioner control of the accounts that are in this petition and that the Court has discretion to waive the notice requirement. The Court makes reference to and reads the statutory language. Mr. Lazar stated that it is a miscarriage of justice to make these people wait, that the merits and the basic facts are clear, that he used the Court form and that he sent it to everyone entitled to receive notice. The Court once again makes reference to the rules regarding notice and informed Mr. Lazar that he can get waivers of notice that contain the required language. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is continued to July 16, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Any filings are to be filed by July 11, 2019.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
